pkgmetadata.longdescription: AWS Lambda Layer with zip[[NPM version](httpsbadge.fury.iojscdk-lambda-layer-zip.svg)](httpsbadge.fury.iojscdk-lambda-layer-zip)[[PyPI version](httpsbadge.fury.iopycdk-lambda-layer-zip.svg)](httpsbadge.fury.iopycdk-lambda-layer-zip)[Release](httpsgithub.comclarencetwcdk-lambda-layer-zipworkflowsreleasebadge.svg)[[Gitpod Ready-to-Code](httpsimg.shields.iobadgeGitpod-ready--to--code-bluelogogitpod)](httpsgitpod.iohttpsgithub.comclarencetwcdk-lambda-layer-zip)Usagepython ZipLayer bundles the tar gzip 7z in a lambda layerimport { ZipLayer } from cdk-lambda-layer-zipdeclare const fn lambda.Functionfn.addLayers(new ZipLayer(this, ZipLayer))pythonimport { ZipLayer } from cdk-lambda-layer-zipimport as lambda from aws-cdk-libaws-lambdanew lambda.Function(this, MyLambda, { code lambda.Code.fromAsset(path.join(__dirname, my-lambda-handler)), handler index.main, runtime lambda.Runtime.PYTHON_3_9, layers [new ZipLayer(this, ZipLayer)]})
